titleStmt.title: Transcription and Translation of DCA DCD Misc. Ch. 7162

respStmt.resp: Exported from Models of Authority data
respStmt.name: tei_exporter

availability.p: Status unknown. Exported for research and migration workflows.

revisionDesc.change: transcription moa=906 status=reviewed modified=2022-11-01 16:22:01.879386+00 | translation moa=907 status=reviewed modified=2022-11-01 16:22:01.895383+00

p.cl:
. M . Rex Scott’ . Episcopis . Abbatibus . Comitibus . et Baronibus . Iusticiis . Vicecomitibus . Prepositis . et Ministris . Francis et Anglicis . Scottis et Galwethiensibus .
Clericis . et Laicis . et Omnibus hominibus Tocius terre sue Salutem .

Sciatis quod postquam arma suscepi Dedi . Concessi . et hac Carta mea Confirmavi 
Waltero filio Alani . Meo Senescallo  Birchinside . et leggardeswde per Rectas Diuisas Suas . Scilicet Ita plenarie et Integre Sicut Rex
Dauid . Auus meus predictas Terras In Dominico Tenuit . Dedi etiam predicto Waltero  Molle per Rectas Diuisas suas . et cum Omnibus Iustis Suis
pertinentiis . Tenend’ . et habend’ . sibi et heredibus suis De me et heredibus meis In Feodo et hereditate . Ita libere et quiete .
plenarie et honorifice  Sicut Aliquis Comes uel Baro In Regno Scotie Terram aliquam de me liberius . quietius . plenius . et
honorificentius Tenet et possidet . faciendo de predictis Terris mihi et heredibus meis Seruitium vnius Militis .

Hiis Testibus .
Ernaldo . Episcopo Sancti Andree . Herberto . Episcopo de Glasgu . Iohanne Abbate de kelchou . Willelmo Abbate de Melros . Osberto . Abbate de Ieddewrde . Waltero
Cancellario . Willelmo fratre Regis . Ricardo de Moreuilla . Gilberto . de Vmframauilla . Waldeuo filio . Comitis . Cospatricii . Iordano . Ridel .

Malcolm king of the Scots, to bishops, abbots, earls and barons, justices, sheriffs, provosts and officials, French and English, Gaelic and Galwegian, clerk and lay, and all men of his entire land, greeting.

Know that after I assumed knighthood, I gave, granted, and by this my charter made firm, to Walter son of Alan, my steward, Birkenside and Legerwood by their correct boundaries, that is to say, fully and entirely, just as King David, my grandfather held the said lands in demesne. I have also given Mow to the said Walter by its correct boundaries, and with all its lawful pertinents, for him and his heirs to hold and to have of me and my heirs in feu and heritage, as freely and quitly, fully and honourably, as any earl or baron holds and possesses any land of me freely, fully, and honourably, performing for the said lands to me and my heirs the service of one knight.

With these witnesses, Arnold the bishop of St Andrews, Herbert the bishop of Glasgow, John the abbot of Kelso, William the abbot of Melrose, Obser the abbot of Jedburgh, Walter the chancellor, William the king's brother, Richard de Morville, Gilbert de Umfraville, Waldeve the brother of Earl Cospatric, Jordan Ridel.
